accessNotes.en: O Dimos Salaminas katagrafei to Lamprano stis paralies tis notias plevras, eno amesi topiki pigi anaferei prosvasi me avtokinito kai chomatino televtaio tmima pou thelei prosochi.
accessNotes.gr: Ο Δήμος Σαλαμίνας καταγράφει το Λαμπρανό στις παραλίες της νότιας πλευράς, ενώ άμεση τοπική πηγή αναφέρει πρόσβαση με αυτοκίνητο και χωμάτινο τελευταίο τμήμα που θέλει προσοχή.
accessNotes.fr: O Dimos Salaminas katagrafei to Lamprano stis paralies tis notias plevras, eno amesi topiki pigi anaferei prosvasi me avtokinito kai chomatino televtaio tmima pou thelei prosochi.

access.label: Χωματόδρομος με προσοχή
access.notes: Ο Δήμος Σαλαμίνας καταγράφει το Λαμπρανό στις παραλίες της νότιας πλευράς, ενώ άμεση τοπική πηγή αναφέρει πρόσβαση με αυτοκίνητο και χωμάτινο τελευταίο τμήμα που θέλει προσοχή.

waterDepth.label: Μέτριο βάθος
waterDepth.notes: Δεν υπάρχει άμεση source-backed επιβεβαίωση για ρηχά ή βαθιά νερά, οπότε το βάθος μένει συντηρητικά ουδέτερο.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 audit 2026-05-25: confidence downgraded from high to low because no source URL, verification source, or evidence note is recorded yet. Phase 2 final global low-evidence cleanup 2026-05-26: no direct source is recorded for stronger access/confidence claims; record kept as low-confidence baseline until source-backed review.
Phase 2 final global low-only cleanup 2026-05-26: no direct source is recorded yet; record kept as low-confidence baseline until source-backed review.

Phase 2 Salamina source pass 2026-05-27: Salamina municipality lists Lamprano among island beaches/creeks and OSM node 11098828505 is a same-name beach feature at the current Mikro Lamprano coordinates. Source supports identity/location only for this pass; confidence, access, services, amenities, and recommendation logic remain unchanged pending stricter local review.

Salamina low-confidence cleanup 2026-05-29: Salamina municipality supports Lamprano identity/locality and general beach access context; e-nearme gives direct Mikro Lamprano terrain, no-organization, car access and cautious dirt-road final approach; AllOverGreece supports the Kanakia-Mikro Lamprano walking route. Marketing/live-condition wording was not imported.

High-confidence Salamina follow-up 2026-06-02: Salamina municipality supports Lamprano identity/locality, e-nearme gives direct Mikro Lamprano pebble/rock and unorganized-beach detail with car plus cautious dirt-road access, and AllOverGreece supports the Kanakia-Mikro Lamprano walking-route context. Marketing phrases and live calm/protected/safe claims were not imported; no windProfile or scoring was changed.

accessNotes.en: I paralia Agiou Nikolaou sti Salamina, stin periochi Peristeria/notia Salamina, echei odiki prosvasi kai ipio topiko charaktira. Einai mikro fysiko simeio kolymvisis, choris pliri organosi.

sourceNotes: Low-confidence follow-up 2026-05-28: the official bathing-water profile identifies Agios Nikolaos Anatolika in Salamina Bay and lists pebble/rock shore context plus nearby refreshment/restaurant services; map source supports stored coordinates. Promoted to medium for identity, terrain and nearby services; no wind or sea-state claims were added.

Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02 J: direct official, bathing-profile, or dedicated local beach sources support the recorded static identity, access, terrain, and service context for this record. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; windProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

sourceNotes: Low-confidence follow-up 2026-05-28: Salamina municipality lists Kanakia among island beaches/creeks with easy access, and AllOverGreece identifies Kanakia beach on Salamina with organized seasonal services. Promoted to medium for identity, access and service context; no wind or sea-state claims were added.

High-confidence Salamina follow-up 2026-06-02: Salamina municipality, AllOverGreece and the official Kanakia bathing profile support identity, easy road-access context, mixed sand/pebble beach character and organized/seasonal-service context. No windProfile, scoring, live calm/protected/safe, or ideal-beach claim was changed.
